title: helianthemum glaucum f. stoechadifolium
intro: Helianthemum glaucum f. stoechadifolium, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum glaucum f. stoechadifolium include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. This plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including skin irritations, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
